creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
canuum port has been  ported. This port is a Japanese input tty frontend
for Canna using uum.

I put the port packed with tar czf and uuencode below "Fix:"

Packed tarball is :
-rw-r--r--  1 kiri  staff  3837 Jan 23 15:55 ja-canuum-1.0-990123.tar.gz
Packed list is :
drwxr-xr-x kiri/staff        0 Jan 23 15:55 1999 canuum/
-rw-r--r-- kiri/staff     1123 Jan 23 15:55 1999 canuum/Makefile
drwxr-xr-x kiri/staff        0 Jan 22 21:53 1999 canuum/files/
-rw-r--r-- kiri/staff      115 Jan 22 21:50 1999 canuum/files/md5
drwxr-xr-x kiri/staff        0 Jan 22 21:53 1999 canuum/patches/
-rw-r--r-- kiri/staff     2637 Jan 22 21:50 1999 canuum/patches/patch-aa
-rw-r--r-- kiri/staff     1154 Jan 22 21:50 1999 canuum/patches/patch-ac
-rw-r--r-- kiri/staff     2258 Jan 22 21:50 1999 canuum/patches/patch-ae
drwxr-xr-x kiri/staff        0 Jan 22 21:53 1999 canuum/pkg/
